items.q: How do I get my student ID card?
items.a: Student ID cards are issued on Day 1 of Orientation Week at the Admin Building. Bring your admission letter, NIC/passport, and 2 passport-size photos.

items.q: What do I do if I lose my student ID?
items.a: Report the loss immediately to Campus Security, then request a replacement card at the Admin Building (a small reissue fee applies).

items.q: What is the student ID used for?
items.a: Your ID doubles as your library card, exam admission card, and campus building access card, so keep it with you at all times.
